content:
✨ 1Hosts | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with comprehensive DNS blocklists that can be easily integrated into their existing network or device configurations to block unwanted content like ads, trackers, and malware.
✨ Key Features: • Multiple blocklist variants (Lite, Xtra) • Support for various clients and formats (AdAway, Pi-hole, dnscrypt-proxy, uBlock Origin, AdGuardHome, dnsmasq, Unbound, Windows hosts file, Little Snitch)
📖 Summary: 1Hosts provides curated DNS blocklists designed to enhance privacy, security, and user experience by filtering out ads, trackers, and malware. It offers different variants and formats compatible with various DNS filtering software and operating systems.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
